init.title: SPUX Initializer
init.description: First-time SPUX setup — installs VSCode, Cline, and ~/.spux config.

proxy.title: Local Proxy Setup
proxy.description: Configures a local HTTP/HTTPS proxy for development.

vscode-setup.title: VSCode Power-User Setup
vscode-setup.description: Installs a curated bundle of VSCode extensions for AI work.

llm-connect.title: LLM Provider Connector
llm-connect.description: Wires up API keys for Claude, OpenAI, Gemini in ~/.spux/config.

cline-anthropic-proxy.title: Cline + Anthropic (SF Bedrock Proxy)
cline-anthropic-proxy.description: Installs VSCode + Cline and wires it to Claude via a local Salesforce Bedrock proxy on :9999.
